response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience and some D/C++ exposure, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with cloud compute focus. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems at the required scale. Skillset is misaligned with a C++-centric Technical Lead role.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Some exposure to high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic real-time data integration)
Demonstrated mentoring, workshops, and community teaching experience
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience (only one short C/C++ role)
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed systems leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the scale required

key_factors.factor: Missing cloud compute platform / distributed systems depth
Broad polyglot engineering background and mentoring track record
